news_items.headline: Injury-riddled Mets lose Holmes to fractured fibul...
news_items.summary: Mets starting pitcher Clay Holmes suffered a fractured right fibula when he was hit by a 111.1 mph comebacker in the fourth inning against the Yankees.

news_items.headline: Dodgers' Snell scratched from scheduled start
news_items.summary: Dodgers left-hander Blake Snell was a late scratch from his second start of the season Friday at Angel Stadium because of loose bodies in his left elbow, which will sideline him indefinitely.

news_items.headline: Schwarber ups HR total to 20 as Phils win wild one...
news_items.summary: Kyle Schwarber can't really explain why he's on a tear right now. "It's a great question," the Phillies slugger said after smashing a pair of two-run homers -- boosting his season total to 20 -- during an 11-9, 10-inning victory over the Pirates.

news_items.headline: Orioles' Westburg out for 2026 after TJ surgery
news_items.summary: Baltimore Orioles infielder Jordan Westburg had Tommy John surgery on his injured right elbow Wednesday and will miss the 2026 season.

news_items.headline: Back soon? Skubal tossing 2 weeks post-surgery
news_items.summary: Tigers left-hander Tarik Skubal is playing catch just two weeks after having surgery on his pitching elbow, sparking hope in Detroit that the team's ace could be back sooner than expected.

news_items.headline: Yanks' Fried headed to 15-day IL with bone bruise
news_items.summary: The New York Yankees will place pitcher Max Fried on the 15-day injured list because of a left elbow bruise, the team announced Friday.

news_items.headline: Mets' makeover vs. run-it-back Yankees: What's wor...
news_items.summary: With the first Subway Series of the season upon us, we take a look at two teams with very different philosophies.

news_items.headline: As urgency mounts, Aaron Judge hasn't changed
news_items.summary: Amid mounting pressure to end NYY's title drought, the Yankees' captain is keeping his expectations sky-high.

news_items.summary: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. will snap his skid at the dish with a single today, per our Blue Jays vs. Tigers predictions for Saturday, May 16.

news_items.headline: For injured Cal Raleigh, a chance to reflect
news_items.summary: Seattle’s iron man catcher is being forced to take a step back. What might he learn from it?

news_items.headline: River Ryan returns from injured list for Oklahoma City
news_items.summary: Friday in Albuquerque showcased a pair of players who may very well find themselves with the Dodgers within a few weeks. Player of the day River Ryan struck out four and allowed only one run on the moon at Isotopes Park in Albuquerque, with four strikeouts. It was his first start since April 11, after […]
